title: LV Circuits
discoveryHint: Start making circuits to unlock this page.

sections.text: LV circuits start with Resistors (the easier component, prefer the Fine Wire recipe to save materials) and Vacuum Tubes (harder, requiring wires and sticks). The board is a Coated Circuit Board made from Wood Pulp compressed into Wood Plates combined with Glue or Sticky Resin.
Red Alloy, an alloy of Copper and Redstone, is needed for Electronic Circuits. It is completely fictional but essential for conductivity in early electronics.
